colors.principle: High-contrast ink on pure white with a single vibrant blue primary action color

rules: Tight line heights and negative tracking for display text
Clear visual hierarchy through weight and size

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 4px base grid with generous vertical padding

surfaces.borders: Subtle 1px borders for card separation

layout.skeleton: Centered single-column layout with a prominent full-width hero

colors.principle: 纯黑 #000000 占据 90%+ 画面，所有文字靠白色梯度层级区分，蓝色 #2997FF 仅用于可交互元素

scale.use: 产品名主标题如 iPhone 17 Pro
副标题如 All out Pro.
按钮内文字 Learn more / Buy

rules: 产品名标题 600 weight 非 700+，保持克制而非粗暴加粗
副标题 400 weight 细于标题形成明确层级差
nav 文字极小约 12-13px 灰色低调不抢视觉焦点
所有文字严格水平垂直居中对齐

spacing.rhythm: 慷慨 —— section 间上下 padding 约 80-120px，产品图与文字间距约 24-32px，呼吸感极大

shadows: 几乎无阴影 —— 全黑背景上靠产品摄影自身光影建层次
surfaces.borders: 仅按钮描边用 1px semi-transparent white/blue，无卡片边框无分割线

layout.skeleton: fixed semi-transparent nav → hero 产品名+副标题+双按钮+满幅产品摄影 → 重复同样结构的第二 section(MacBook Pro) → 继续堆叠

patterns: nav 背景 blur 半透明暗示滚动时 fixed 定位
产品图可能随滚动有微妙视差或 fade-in 但静态无法确认

colors.principle: Clean, high-contrast palette with a dominant bright blue section that creates visual energy and warmth

rules: Headlines use bold weight with tight letter-spacing
Body text maintains generous line-height for readability
Quote text uses italicized humanist-sans for emphasis

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 4px base with generous spacing between sections for breathing room

surfaces.borders: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1)

layout.skeleton: Centered single-column layout with full-width sections and generous vertical spacing

patterns: Smooth hover transitions on interactive elements

colors.principle: High-contrast monochrome palette with a full-bleed atmospheric image. The brand's signature deep blue appears only in the isolated logo mark, maintaining strict restraint in the main interface.

rules: Utilize wide letter-spacing for all uppercase navigation elements.
Keep typography extremely minimal to let the photography dominate.
Rely on negative space and positioning rather than typographic hierarchy.

spacing.rhythm: Generous padding and negative space to emphasize the atmospheric background.

surfaces.borders: Minimal to none, relying on image boundaries and spacing for visual separation.

layout.skeleton: Full-viewport hero layout with a floating central element and a fixed bottom navigation bar.

patterns: Subtle parallax scrolling on the background image.
Gentle floating animation on the central glass card.

colors.principle: Dark, high-contrast palette with a single bright accent for links and interactive elements.

rules: Use -0.1em tracking for uppercase navigation labels.
Maintain 1.6 line-height for body text to ensure readability.

spacing.rhythm: Generous vertical spacing between sections creates a clear, breathable layout.

layout.skeleton: Two-column layout with a fixed-width sidebar (approx 35%) for navigation and a fluid content area.

colors.principle: Warm, neutral, and calm

spacing.rhythm: 8px baseline grid

surfaces.borders: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1)

layout.skeleton: Two-column layout

colors.principle: High-contrast black-and-white foundation with subtle accent usage.

spacing.rhythm: Generous vertical spacing creates a clean, uncluttered feel.

surfaces.borders: Subtle 1px borders or no borders, relying on spacing and layout.

layout.skeleton: A centered, single-column hero layout transitioning into a multi-column visual grid.

colors.principle: Extreme restraint with a warm, off-white background and high-contrast dark ink for focus.

rules: Display text is large, tightly tracked, and centered.
Uppercase tracking is used for short category labels.
Weight is kept to regular and medium for a refined look.

spacing.rhythm: Generous vertical spacing emphasizes the empty space and breathing room.

surfaces.borders: Thin, subtle outlines on inputs and secondary buttons; no heavy container borders.

layout.skeleton: Centered single-column layout with massive vertical padding to focus on typography.

colors.principle: High-contrast black and white with warm gray accents for a professional, clean aesthetic.

rules: Use transitional-serif for primary headlines to convey authority.
Use humanist-sans for all body and UI text for clarity and readability.
Avoid overly decorative or script fonts.

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 4px base unit creates a predictable, clean grid.

surfaces.borders: Thin, light borders are used sparingly for definition.

layout.skeleton: Classic hero section with headline, subcopy, and CTA buttons, followed by a product showcase area.

colors.principle: Extreme high contrast with pure black background and white text for maximum impact

rules: Headlines use tight letter-spacing and heavy weights for impact
Body text uses regular weight for readability against dark background
No decorative serifs or script fonts

spacing.rhythm: Generous vertical spacing between sections, tight line spacing for headlines

surfaces.borders: No visible borders; reliance on spacing and contrast for separation

layout.skeleton: Full-width hero section followed by a horizontal scroll gallery of site examples

patterns: Smooth horizontal scroll for gallery section
Subtle hover states on navigation links

colors.principle: White background with a single high-chroma blue accent and neutral grays.

spacing.rhythm: Generous white space

surfaces.borders: None visible

layout.skeleton: Centered layout with no visible structure

colors.principle: Extreme contrast with minimal color, using monochrome and muted grays to emphasize precision and focus.

spacing.rhythm: Generous whitespace and tight vertical rhythm in navigation

surfaces.borders: Subtle, thin borders using rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)

layout.skeleton: Standard top navigation with logo, links, and CTAs; large hero section with left-aligned text

colors.principle: Clean white backgrounds with warm coral accents for emphasis

rules: Use geometric sans-serif for headlines and headings
Use humanist sans-serif for body text and descriptions
Maintain generous line height for readability
Use letter spacing for large display text

spacing.rhythm: 8px vertical rhythm system with consistent spacing between sections

surfaces.borders: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1)

layout.skeleton: 12-column grid with centered content containers

patterns: Smooth hover transitions on interactive elements

colors.principle: Clean, high-contrast light background with a single bold orange accent.

rules: Headlines use a refined transitional serif with medium weight.
Body text is a neutral humanist sans-serif for readability.

spacing.rhythm: Generous vertical spacing to create a calm, breathable layout.

surfaces.borders: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1) for separation.

layout.skeleton: Standard 12-column grid with ample horizontal padding.

patterns: Subtle hover states on navigation and links.

colors.principle: Extreme restraint with high-contrast typography and neutral backgrounds.

rules: Tight letter-spacing for headlines
Generous line-height for body text
High contrast for readability

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 8px grid with generous vertical spacing for breathing room.

surfaces.borders: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1) for inputs and cards.

layout.skeleton: Centered content with generous white space and clear visual hierarchy.

patterns: Subtle hover effects on interactive elements

colors.principle: 主页面 80% 是暖纸 + ink；深色区只用于产品 showcase；不用品牌色做按钮，按钮永远是 ink 黑

rules: 标题永远 500 weight（不上 600/700）
永不使用 italic
caption 永远 uppercase + 0.06em letter-spacing

spacing.rhythm: section padding 96-128px；卡片内 24-32px；hero 极其慷慨

surfaces.borders: 极少 hairline，主要靠空间分隔而非线

layout.skeleton: Top: 极简文字 nav 无 backdrop / Hero: 全屏产品摄影 + 一句话标题 / Sections: 大图 + 大字 + 极少正文，密度递减 / Footer: 单行

patterns: scroll reveal: 大块淡入 + 上移 16px
hover 几乎不动作，靠 cursor 变化提示可点

colors.principle: High-contrast with vibrant accent for key actions, dark base for premium feel

rules: Use geometric sans-serif for headlines and body
Maintain tight letter-spacing for large display text
Use weight 500 for headlines, 400 for body
Ensure sufficient contrast ratios on dark backgrounds

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 4px base with generous spacing for premium feel

layout.skeleton: Full-width hero with centered content, generous whitespace, strong vertical rhythm

patterns: Gentle hover transitions on interactive elements

colors.principle: High-contrast, monochromatic dark mode with absolute black background.

spacing.rhythm: Generous vertical spacing to emphasize the minimalist aesthetic.

surfaces.borders: Subtle, low-opacity borders for separation without visual weight.

layout.skeleton: Centered single-column hero layout with strict vertical alignment.

colors.principle: Extreme restraint with near-black and off-white to focus attention purely on content.

rules: Use a classic transitional serif for both display and body to convey intellectual rigor.
Keep line lengths short for optimal readability.
Use weight 400 for a calm, unhurried tone.

spacing.rhythm: Generous and deliberate, creating a strong sense of calm and focus through extensive padding.

surfaces.borders: Minimal to none, relying on spacing and color for separation.

layout.skeleton: A sparse, vertical column layout with the logo and menu anchored to the left edge.

patterns: Subtle fades and slow, deliberate transitions to maintain a calm atmosphere.

colors.principle: Clean white canvas with a bold, primary violet accent and expressive, high-chroma gradient hero.

rules: Use dark ink on light backgrounds.
Display type uses tight tracking and heavy weight for maximum impact.
Avoid pure black; stick to deep navy or slate for body copy.

spacing.rhythm: 8px base grid for consistent spacing.

surfaces.borders: Subtle 1px borders to define surfaces without heavy shadows.

layout.skeleton: Centered, constrained container with generous whitespace.

colors.principle: Monochrome primary palette with high contrast, using chromatic color only within a single decorative graphic element.

rules: Headlines use tight negative letter-spacing for a compact, bold feel.
Body text uses generous line-height for readability.
Strong hierarchy established through significant weight and size differences.

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 8px grid system with clear vertical and horizontal rhythm.

surfaces.borders: Light, single-pixel lines in rgba(0,0,0,0.1) or #E5E5E5 for structure.

layout.skeleton: Centered, single-column hero with fluid container, followed by structured content sections.

patterns: Smooth color transitions on interactive elements
